title: Evangelion manga 85 Is this from it
display_title: Evangelion manga 85 Is this from it
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion manga 85? Is this from it? Post by MaskedOmega » Sun May 01, 2011 8:52 pm Someone posted this image on a forum and they claimed it was from manga issue 85. I have been searching issue 85 on the internet and I just cannot find it. [URL=http://img842.imageshack.us/i/1304284358553.jpg/] [/URL] Uploaded with [URL=http://imageshack.us]ImageShack.us[/URL]

[]: Post by symbv » Sun May 01, 2011 8:53 pm Have you checked the Japanese sites? Like http://yaraon.blog109.fc2.com/blog-entry-1741.html or http://matomate.blog133.fc2.com/blog-entry-1646.html ? I do not know which stage the latest installment should be though -- is it supposed to be stage 85?

[]: Post by MaskedOmega » Sun May 01, 2011 8:55 pm Thanks, but I am having trouble navigating the site, where do I read the full issue, like where do I click?

[]: Post by Stryker » Sun May 01, 2011 8:58 pm Yay, Asuka gun live!

[]: Post by symbv » Sun May 01, 2011 9:04 pm MaskedOmega wrote: Thanks, but I am having trouble navigating the site, where do I read the full issue, like where do I click?

[]: Post by MaskedOmega » Sun May 01, 2011 9:12 pm symbv wrote: Is stage 85 supposed to be the installment on Young Ace 2011 May issue? If so, then the pages I put up is supposed to be from the latest issue, Young Ace 2011 June issue, which came out only TODAY (though some places in Japan sold it earlier). Does this make it stage 86 then? Is there a scan of stage 85 somewhere on the net already ?

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun May 01, 2011 9:13 pm Yes, it's real. It's already being discussed in the thread for new stages: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?p=455104#455104
